CustomField.description: Salesforce User ID of the user whose execution context emitted this log entry. Filter reports and queries by this field — not CreatedById — to find logs from a specific user. CreatedById is always the Automated Process user because log entries are persisted by a Platform Event trigger subscriber.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Filter by this field, not CreatedById, to find the emitting user. Platform Event subscribers always run as the Automated Process user.
CustomField.label: User ID
